title: Werewolves of the Bayou Bibliography
text:
Rougarou Bibliography
Werewolf Histories Willem de Blecourt
The Book of Were-Wolves Sabine Baring-Gould

Swapping Stories: Folktales from Louisiana Edited by Carl Lindahl, Maida Owens, and C. Renee Harvison
Folklore Figures of French and Creole Louisiana Nathan J. Rabalais

title: About
